nasb.text: In the cities of Manasseh, Ephraim, Simeon, even as far as Naphtali, in their surrounding ruins,

esv.text: And in the cities of Manasseh, Ephraim, and Simeon, and as far as Naphtali, in their ruins all around,

cnv.text: 他又在瑪拿西、以法蓮、西緬，以至拿弗他利的各城，以及它們周圍荒廢的地方，都這樣行。

ccb.text: 约西亚还在玛拿西、以法莲、西缅，远至拿弗他利的各城邑及其周围的荒废之地做了同样的事情。
